name: Pioneerz
short_description: Pioneerz make you a pioneer in a fantasy world, it's a sandbox RPG focus on town protection. Help your town, improve your ability, expand your kingdom! The road is harsh to make a peaceful empire!
detailed_description:
Just Updated

For the one who knows Pioneerz from Xbox360, it's the same game. But with improvmeent : 16/9, bigger map and difficulty, pad and keyboard support, improved gameplay...


About the Game

Live the life of a fantasy pioneer: Help your town to grow by protecting it and gathering resource. Explore the world, fight monsters and enemy towns. But be careful, the world is living (Plants grow, animals reproduce, towns are expanding…) And you never know which danger you will encounter (rabbit invasion, wandering trolls, underground scar…) The road is harsh to make a peaceful empire! Nb : Multiplayer needs at least a pad.
